# Pull Request

## What does this change?

<!-- One sentence describing the change. -->

## Why?

<!-- Link to issue, ticket, or describe the motivation. -->

## How did you test it?

<!-- Unit tests, manual testing, integration tests. Be specific. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the relevant section of `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any logic change
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings or errors
- [ ] No new TypeScript errors
- [ ] If touching `packages/rng`, `packages/ledger`, `packages/wallet`, or `packages/compliance`: I have flagged this for Oakley's review
- [ ] If schema migration: I have written a forward-only migration with a rollback plan documented
- [ ] If new dependency: I have justified it in the PR description
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII in the diff

## Risk

<!-- One of: low / medium / high. Justify. -->
